8471e85c4c8c726fa7c9576d93609ade.summary: No file validation in upload process.
8471e85c4c8c726fa7c9576d93609ade.impact: An attacker can upload malicious files that could lead to data loss or system crash.
8471e85c4c8c726fa7c9576d93609ade.root_cause: The server does not validate uploaded files before processing them.
8471e85c4c8c726fa7c9576d93609ade.priority_note: Immediate — this vulnerability allows an attacker to upload harmful files.

f62cf6552ba58a250c0186e7291b8d16.title: XSS Vulnerability Fix
recommendations: Escape all variables using escapeHtml() function.
Ensure that any user input is properly validated and sanitized before outputting it on the page.
f62cf6552ba58a250c0186e7291b8d16.verification: Test all application features to confirm XSS vulnerability has been remediated.
f62cf6552ba58a250c0186e7291b8d16.prevention: Always use a library or framework that automatically escapes variables, or manually escape user input before outputting it on the page.

b9ebad09aeabae752b11ff19265bf448.summary: Reflected XSS in comments section allows reflected HTML.
b9ebad09aeabae752b11ff19265bf448.impact: An attacker can inject malicious scripts which are reflected back to users' browsers leading to potential data theft or manipulation of web pages.
b9ebad09aeabae752b11ff19265bf448.root_cause: The application does not properly sanitize user input before displaying it on the page.
b9ebad09aeabae752b11ff19265bf448.priority_note: Immediate — this vulnerability can be exploited by an attacker.

585bdcec698f6ecf022f3e9e259d28b2.summary: Directory traversal in tar package allows unauthorized access to sensitive files.
585bdcec698f6ecf022f3e9e259d28b2.impact: An attacker can exploit this vulnerability to read or write any file on the system without proper authorization.
585bdcec698f6ecf022f3e9e259d28b2.root_cause: The tar package does not properly sanitize user input when creating archive files, leading to directory traversal.
585bdcec698f6ecf022f3e9e259d28b2.priority_note: Immediate — this vulnerability can be exploited by an attacker with low-level permissions.

e577d37e2bb63f83179be7471f871222.summary: Forgeable Public/Private Tokens in jws package of juice-shop@19.1.1.
e577d37e2bb63f83179be7471f871222.impact: An attacker can generate valid tokens that they control without knowing the private key used to sign them, potentially leading to unauthorized access or data manipulation.
e577d37e2bb63f83179be7471f871222.root_cause: The jws package does not properly validate token signatures before accepting them for use.
e577d37e2bb63f83179be7471f871222.priority_note: Immediate — this vulnerability can lead to significant security issues.

fbb48c6c3e5d5b0ca87e14894a1b4640.summary: Path traversal in file system allows reading arbitrary files.
fbb48c6c3e5d5b0ca87e14894a1b4640.impact: An attacker can read any file from the server's filesystem without proper authorization.
fbb48c6c3e5d5b0ca87e14894a1b4640.root_cause: File paths are not properly sanitized before being used to access a file.
fbb48c6c3e5d5b0ca87e14894a1b4640.priority_note: Immediate — this vulnerability can lead to unauthorized data disclosure.

a7f1a3910b985bbb5ab4a0eb8878a559.title: JSON Web Signature (JWS) Vulnerability Fix
recommendations: Upgrade to a version of jws that is not vulnerable.
Review the codebase for usage of jws and ensure it's being used correctly.
Ensure all tokens are properly signed and validated.
a7f1a3910b985bbb5ab4a0eb8878a559.verification: Run tests to ensure that the jws version has been correctly upgraded.
a7f1a3910b985bbb5ab4a0eb8878a559.prevention: Always use a secure and updated version of jws.
